content.text:
<user_query>

Toolbox changes committed and pushed to GitHub (commit 2538f12 on main).

Changes:
- commands/play-motion-rl.md: Removed --push_vel_xy, updated --interactive description for modal controls
- scripts/play_motion_rl.sh: Removed --push_vel_xy arg parsing and forwarding, updated interactive mode info

Please sync to all registered hosts.
</user_query>
All four reviewers returned `apply` with no blockers. Syncing to all hosts.
